message:
rename(web): change /core_flywheel route to /core-flywheel for URL consistency

All other routes in the project use hyphens (complete-guide, ssh-connect,
etc.) while core_flywheel used an underscore. This rename brings it in
line with the rest of the site.

Changes:
- Move apps/web/app/core_flywheel/ → apps/web/app/core-flywheel/
- Update the homepage Link href from /core_flywheel to /core-flywheel
- Add permanent 301 redirect in next.config.ts so existing bookmarks,
  search-engine indexes, and shared links continue to work
- Update layout metadata: canonical URL, openGraph.url, and title
  (also removes the redundant " | Agent Flywheel" suffix that was
  being doubled by the root layout's title template)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
